text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash is taste-testing her latest cake in the
dorm kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Despite following the recipe to the letter, the
sweetness is lacking a certain kind of depth...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The overall taste is up to par. Perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, this won't do. I can't serve this subpar cake to
the others. I need to revisit and revise the recipe.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But neither can I let this cake go to waste. As the
baker, I must take it upon myself to consume it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must say, this task is more difficult than I
thought... I can't seem to achieve the flavor I'm
seeking here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's skin breaks out as a result of
consuming excess sugar during her trial-and-error
cooking process.
